statement: In every magma, Equation 4215 (`x * y = ((z * y) * y) * w`) implies Equation 386 (`x * y = (y * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0101
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z y) y) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y x) z)
